name: architecture-analysis-platform
description: Diploma-ready backend scaffold for architectural code analysis with manager service and worker orchestra.

scripts.check: node --check src/manager/app.js && node --check src/manager/routes.js && node --check src/manager/auth-routes.js && node --check src/manager/auth-service.js && node --check src/shared/postgres.js && node --check src/workers/js/app.js && node --check src/workers/js/analyzer.js && node --check src/workers/typescript/app.js && node --check src/workers/typescript/analyzer.js && python -m py_compile src/workers/python/app.py src/workers/python/analyzer.py
